creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
The www/mediawiki port depends on graphics/pecl-imagick for ImageMagick 
support.  You can define WITHOUT_X11 and graphics/pecl-imagick with depend on 
graphics/ImageMagick-nox11 instead of graphics/ImageMagick.
-- 
Jason E. Hale - jhale@
FreeBSD Ports Committer
KDE/FreeBSD Team
